zh.Southwell, , Nottingham, England: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾素維爾
zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Mareschal是Unknown de Mareschal和Denham的兒子，於1263年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾素維爾。他於1288年與Emma Kenington在英國諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Southwell, , Nottingham, England: 英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾素維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Mareschal是Unknown de Mareschal和Denham的儿子，于1263年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾素維爾。他于1288年与Emma Kenington在英国諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Mareschal was born in 1263, in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Unknown de Mareschal and Denham. He married Emma Kenington in 1288, in Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Mareschal est né en 1263, à Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Unknown de Mareschal et Denham. Il a épousé Emma Kenington en 1288, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Mareschal wurde 1263 in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Unknown de Mareschal und Denham geboren. Er hat 1288 in Nottinghamshire, England Emma Kenington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Mareschal è nato il nel 1263 nel Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Unknown de Mareschal e Denham. Lui sposato Emma Kenington nel 1288, nel Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Nottinghamshire, England: イギリスノッティンガムシュアイア
ja.Southwell, , Nottingham, England: イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアソウスウエル
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Mareschalは1263年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアソウスウエルでUnknown de MareschalとDenhamの息子として生まれた。1288年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでEmma Keningtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Mareschal(은)는 1263년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 소우스웰에서 Unknown de Mareschal(와)과 Denham의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1288년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 Emma Kenington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.Southwell, , Nottingham, England: Southwell, Snotengaham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Mareschal nasceu em 1263, em Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Unknown de Mareschal e Denham. Ele casou-se com Emma Kenington em 1288, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Mareschal родился в 1263 г. в местности соутвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Unknown de Mareschal и Denham. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma Kenington в 1288 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Mareschal nació en 1263, en Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Unknown de Mareschal y Denham. Se casó con Emma Kenington en 1288, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en su pueblo.
